hero.label: Legal
hero.heading: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content:
PVCON ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website (pvcon.in) or engage with our pharmacovigilance consulting services.

This policy applies to all visitors, clients, and users of our website and services. By accessing our website, you consent to the data practices described in this policy.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content:
We may collect the following types of information:

**Personal Information You Provide:**
- Name, email address, phone number, and company name when you fill out contact forms or Get in Touch
- Professional credentials and organizational details when you engage our consulting services
- Communication records when you correspond with us via email or other channels

**Information Collected Automatically:**
- IP address, browser type, operating system, and device information
- Pages visited, time spent on pages, and navigation patterns
- Referring website addresses and search terms used to find our site
- Cookies and similar tracking technologies (see our Cookie Policy for details)

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content:
We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

- To respond to your inquiries and provide requested services
- To deliver pharmacovigilance consulting, audit, and training services
- To send relevant updates about our services, regulatory changes, and industry insights (with your consent)
- To improve our website, services, and user experience
- To comply with legal obligations and regulatory requirements
- To analyze website traffic and usage patterns through Google Analytics
- To protect against fraudulent, unauthorized, or illegal activity

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
sections.content:
For individuals in the European Economic Area (EEA), we process personal data under the following legal bases:

- **Consent:** When you voluntarily provide your data through forms or subscribe to communications
- **Contractual Necessity:** When processing is required to fulfill a consulting engagement or service agreement
- **Legitimate Interest:** For improving our services, website security, and business operations
- **Legal Obligation:** When required to comply with applicable laws and regulations

sections.title: 5. Data Sharing and Disclosure
sections.content:
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with:

- **Service Providers:** Trusted third-party vendors who assist us in operating our website (e.g., hosting providers, analytics services like Google Analytics)
- **Legal Requirements:** When required by law, court order, or governmental authority
- **Business Transfers:** In connection with any merger, acquisition, or sale of company assets

All third-party service providers are contractually obligated to protect your data and use it only for the purposes for which it was shared.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content:
We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. Specifically:

- Contact form submissions: Retained for up to 3 years from the date of last communication
- Client engagement records: Retained for the duration of the engagement plus 7 years for regulatory compliance
- Analytics data: Retained for 26 months (as configured in Google Analytics)

You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content:
Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

- **Right to Access:** Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
- **Right to Rectification:** Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
- **Right to Erasure:** Request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten")
- **Right to Restrict Processing:** Request that we limit how we use your data
- **Right to Data Portability:** Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
- **Right to Object:** Object to the processing of your data for certain purposes
- **Right to Withdraw Consent:** Withdraw previously given consent at any time

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at info@pvcon.in.

sections.title: 8. International Data Transfers
sections.content: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your country of residence, including India. When we transfer data internationally, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission where applicable.

sections.title: 9. Data Security
sections.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:

- SSL/TLS encryption for data in transit
- Secure hosting infrastructure with regular security updates
- Access controls and authentication mechanisms
- Regular security assessments and monitoring

However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: 10. Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our website and services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected data from a minor, please contact us immediately so we can take appropriate action.

sections.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors. We will post the updated policy on this page with a revised "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

sections.title: 12. Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

PVCON
Email: info@pvcon.in
Website: https://pvcon.in

hero.label: Legal
hero.heading: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: The terms and conditions governing your use of our website and services.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content:
By accessing and using the PVCON website (pvcon.in) and our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our website or services.

These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and PVCON.

sections.title: 2. Description of Services
sections.content:
PVCON provides GxP auditing, pharmacovigilance consulting, corporate training, medical writing, PSMF management, and related professional services to pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device organizations worldwide.

The specific scope, deliverables, and terms of any engagement are governed by separate service agreements between PVCON and its clients.

sections.title: 3. Use of Website
sections.content:
You agree to use our website only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You must not:

- Use the website in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations
- Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, servers, or databases
- Transmit any malicious code, viruses, or harmful software
- Engage in any activity that could damage, disable, or impair the website
- Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or extract data from the website without prior written consent
- Impersonate any person or entity, or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content:
All content on this website — including text, graphics, logos, images, design elements, and software — is the property of PVCON or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, display, or create derivative works from any content on this website without prior written permission from PVCON.

The PVCON name, logo, and all related product and service names are trademarks of PVCON.

sections.title: 5. Confidentiality
sections.content:
Any confidential information shared between PVCON and its clients during the course of a professional engagement shall be treated with the utmost confidentiality. Neither party shall disclose confidential information to third parties without prior written consent, except as required by law.

This obligation of confidentiality survives the termination of any engagement.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content:
To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, PVCON shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from:

- Your use of or inability to use the website or services
- Any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in the content
- Unauthorized access to or alteration of your data
- Any third-party conduct or content on the website

Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the fees paid by you for the specific service giving rise to the claim.

sections.title: 7. Indemnification
sections.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless PVCON, its directors, officers, employees, and agents from any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, or expenses (including legal fees) arising out of your use of the website, violation of these terms, or infringement of any third-party rights.

sections.title: 8. Third-Party Links
sections.content:
Our website may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by PVCON. We have no control over, and assume no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites.

The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by PVCON. You acknowledge and agree that PVCON shall not be responsible for any damages or losses caused by your use of any third-party website.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.content:
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the website at any time, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.

All provisions of these terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive, including intellectual property provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity, and limitations of liability.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
sections.content:
These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising from or relating to these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Mumbai, India.

For clients in the European Economic Area, nothing in these terms affects your statutory rights under applicable consumer protection laws.

sections.title: 11. Modifications
sections.content:
PVCON reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on this page. Your continued use of the website after any modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

We encourage you to review these terms periodically for any changes.

sections.title: 12. Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

PVCON
Email: info@pvcon.in
Website: https://pvcon.in

hero.label: Legal
hero.heading: Cookie Policy
hero.subtitle: How we use cookies and similar technologies on our website.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
sections.content:
Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently, improve user experience, and provide information to website owners.

Cookies can be "session cookies" (which expire when you close your browser) or "persistent cookies" (which remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them).

sections.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
sections.content:
PVCON uses cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:

**Essential Cookies:**
These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as page navigation, language preferences, and access to secure areas. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

**Analytics Cookies (Google Analytics):**
We use Google Analytics to collect information about how visitors use our website. This includes data such as the number of visitors, the pages they visit, and the time spent on each page. This data is aggregated and anonymized, and is used to improve our website and services.

Google Analytics cookies used:
- _ga: Used to distinguish unique users (expires after 2 years)
- _ga_*: Used to persist session state (expires after 2 years)
- _gid: Used to distinguish unique users (expires after 24 hours)
- _gat: Used to throttle request rate (expires after 1 minute)

**Preference Cookies:**
These cookies remember your preferences and settings, such as your language selection, to provide a personalized experience on subsequent visits.

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content:
Some cookies on our website are set by third-party services. These include:

- **Google Analytics:** For website traffic analysis and usage statistics
- **Google Search Console:** For search performance monitoring

These third-party services have their own privacy policies governing how they use information collected through their cookies. We encourage you to review:
- Google's Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

sections.title: 4. Managing Cookies
sections.content:
You can control and manage cookies in several ways:

**Browser Settings:**
Most web browsers allow you to manage cookies through their settings. You can typically:
- View what cookies are stored on your device
- Delete individual cookies or all cookies
- Block third-party cookies
- Block all cookies from all sites
- Clear all cookies when you close your browser

**Cookie Consent:**
When you first visit our website, you will see a cookie consent banner. You can choose to accept or decline non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time.

**Opt-Out Links:**
- Google Analytics: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout

Please note that blocking certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

sections.title: 5. Cookie Table
sections.content:
Below is a summary of the cookies used on our website:

| Cookie | Type | Purpose | Duration |
|--------|------|---------|----------|
| cookie_consent | Essential | Stores your cookie consent preference | 1 year |
| NEXT_LOCALE | Essential | Stores your language preference | Session |
| _ga | Analytics | Google Analytics - distinguishes users | 2 years |
| _ga_* | Analytics | Google Analytics - session state | 2 years |
| _gid | Analytics | Google Analytics - distinguishes users | 24 hours |
| _gat | Analytics | Google Analytics - throttle requests | 1 minute |

sections.title: 6. Changes to This Cookie Policy
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legislation, or our data practices. We will post any changes on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.

sections.title: 7. Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:

PVCON
Email: info@pvcon.in
Website: https://pvcon.in

hero.label: Legal
hero.heading: Disclaimer
hero.subtitle: Important notices regarding the information provided on our website.

sections.title: 1. General Disclaimer
sections.content: The information provided on the PVCON website (pvcon.in) is for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information up to date and accurate, PVCON makes no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability of the information, products, services, or related graphics contained on the website.

sections.title: 2. No Professional Advice
sections.content:
The content on this website does not constitute professional pharmacovigilance, regulatory, legal, or medical advice. The information provided should not be used as a substitute for professional consultation.

PVCON's website content is intended to provide a general overview of our services and the pharmacovigilance landscape. For specific regulatory guidance, compliance requirements, or professional advice tailored to your organization's needs, please engage our consulting services directly or consult with qualified professionals.

sections.title: 3. Regulatory Information
sections.content:
Pharmacovigilance regulations, guidelines, and requirements vary by jurisdiction and are subject to frequent updates. While PVCON endeavors to keep regulatory information current, we cannot guarantee that all information on this website reflects the latest regulatory developments.

Users should always verify regulatory requirements with the relevant national competent authorities or regulatory bodies (e.g., EMA, FDA, CDSCO, PMDA) before making compliance decisions.

sections.title: 4. No Guarantees
sections.content:
While PVCON has a strong track record of helping clients achieve regulatory compliance, we do not guarantee specific outcomes from the use of our services, including but not limited to:

- Successful regulatory inspections or audit outcomes
- Approval of marketing authorization applications
- Compliance with specific regulatory requirements

Results depend on multiple factors including client cooperation, organizational readiness, and regulatory authority decisions.

sections.title: 5. External Links
sections.content:
This website may contain links to external websites and resources. PVCON has no control over the nature, content, and availability of those external sites. The inclusion of any links does not necessarily imply a recommendation or endorsement of the views expressed within them.

We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or privacy practices of external websites.

sections.title: 6. Availability
sections.content: We make every effort to keep the website running smoothly. However, PVCON takes no responsibility for, and will not be liable for, the website being temporarily unavailable due to technical issues, maintenance, or circumstances beyond our control.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, PVCON shall not be held liable for any loss or damage, including without limitation, indirect or consequential loss or damage, arising from or in connection with the use of this website.

Your use of any information or materials on this website is entirely at your own risk, for which PVCON shall not be liable.

sections.title: 8. Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have any questions about this disclaimer, please contact us at:

PVCON
Email: info@pvcon.in
Website: https://pvcon.in

Founder & CEO, PVCON

sections.title: Business Description
sections.content:
PVCON is a professional services firm specializing in GxP auditing, pharmacovigilance consulting, corporate training, medical writing, and PSMF management for pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device organizations worldwide.

Our services are provided across 100+ countries, supporting organizations with regulatory compliance, inspection readiness, and quality management in drug safety.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content:
All content published on this website — including text, images, graphics, logos, and design — is protected by applicable intellectual property laws and is the property of PVCON unless otherwise stated.

Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use of the content is prohibited without prior written consent from PVCON.

sections.title: Liability for Content
sections.content:
As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws. However, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. Liability in this regard, however, is only possible from the date of knowledge of a concrete infringement. Upon becoming aware of corresponding infringements, we will remove this content immediately.

sections.title: Liability for Links
sections.content:
Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content.

The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognizable at the time of linking. Permanent monitoring of the content of the linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a legal violation.

sections.title: EU Dispute Resolution
sections.content:
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr

We are not obligated and not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.content:
For detailed information about how we handle your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.

Data Protection Contact: info@pvcon.in
